name: (Beta) Reincarnated As The Villainess
description:
Embark on an epic journey in this fantasy otome RPG, where you find yourself isekai-ed as the villainess in a captivating new world. Your mission? Capture the heart of one out of 5 male leads or create a reverse harem if you want! Will you conquer the realm of romance and claim your happily ever after? The choice is yours.

A/n: Subject to change. I actually want to do more testing myself before publicizing this, but my friend want to test it too. This is a remake, call it V.1(b), with lower tokens. I don't want to tamper with the og since it already went through 4 updates before finalization, and I already like the vibes. Not to mention, I had a long progress with Nathanael that I don't want to lose. Do note, that JLLM is very lacking in handling multi-char and Open AI handles it better.

*Tag: Fempov, Isekai Otome RPG, Romance, Reverse Harem, Fantasy, Adventure.*

List of known bugs, [here](https://discord.com/channels/563783473115168788/1168195002699108454). I can't control website bugs, so keep that in mind when leaving a rating.*
